context.projectOverview: Sprint 3 hand-writes a pure-JS port of the reconciler at .claude/workflows/lib/reconcile.js mirroring the TS twin (src/orchestrator/workflow/reconciler.ts) EXACTLY, plus a shared fixture set and a CI conformance test asserting the twin and port produce byte-identical EvalResult over every fixture. This is the ADR-4 drift gate.

completedSprints.title: EvaluatorPanelReconciler (TS twin)
completedSprints.summary: Pure reconcile(_sprintId,_round,lensVerdicts,timestamp):EvalResult at src/orchestrator/workflow/reconciler.ts. evaluator='panel', strict majority passCount>failCount, fail-closed tie, failing-detail union deduped by `${criterion}\u241F${message}`, feedback joined by newline or 'All lenses passed.', score=Math.round(100*passCount/n), timestamp echoed. Tests use sentinel timestamps.

principles: See .bober/principles.md. NOTE: the JS port is OUTSIDE src/ (.claude/workflows/lib/) so `npm run lint` (eslint src/) won't cover it; that's fine. Do NOT loosen lint by adding broad ignores. The conformance test lives under src/ so it IS linted — keep it clean.
notes: KEY CHALLENGE: importing the plain-JS port from .claude/workflows/lib/reconcile.js into a Vitest test under src/orchestrator/workflow/. Use a relative import path that resolves at test runtime (e.g. a deep `../../../.claude/workflows/lib/reconcile.js`). Vitest resolves ESM .js fine. The TS twin uses _sprintId/_round (underscore) because TS noUnusedParameters; the JS port has no such constraint so name them sprintId/round or _sprintId — output must be IDENTICAL regardless. The port must mirror the twin's exact summary string, dedup key (U+241F separator), feedback join, score rounding, and evaluator='panel'. Conformance test: for each fixture, call both with the SAME sentinel timestamp and assert toEqual; also EvalResultSchema.safeParse(jsPort output).success===true. Read reconciler.ts line-by-line and replicate. Confine changes to: .claude/workflows/lib/reconcile.js, src/orchestrator/workflow/__fixtures__/lens-vectors.json, src/orchestrator/workflow/reconcile-conformance.test.ts.
